narrative:
Precinct West Rutland (precinct in Meigs County) has 549 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.1 percentage points.
